text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature is pessimistic about her debut race,
believing she's not good enough to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After waving off my attempts to motivate her by
telling her to show the crowd what she's made of,
she makes her way out to the track.
